overviewH2: The next generation of Australian roofing.

advantages.title: Long spans
advantages.copy: Up to 8.1m clear — fewer columns, cleaner lines.

advantages.title: Quick install
advantages.copy: No framing, sarking or lining stages.

profiles.name: Monospan
profiles.copy: Clean, contemporary trapezoidal ribs. Ideal for modern residential and architectural projects.

profiles.name: Corrugated
profiles.copy: Classic Australian corrugated profile. Traditional patio and pavilion look with the full structural performance of the range.

profiles.name: Corro / Corro
profiles.copy: Corrugated profile both sides — bold linear repetition top and bottom for a fully architectural soffit.

heroLead: Structural strength and high-performance insulation in one precision-engineered panel. Eliminates purlins, beams, trusses, sarking, bulk insulation and plasterboard — in a single install.
overviewPara1: Insulspan® combines structural strength and high-performance insulation in one precision-engineered panel system — delivering faster construction, superior thermal efficiency and cleaner architectural outcomes.
overviewPara2: Designed for Australian conditions, Insulspan® Structural Insulated Panels eliminate the need for purlins, beams, trusses, mesh, sarking, bulk insulation, and plasterboard, while dramatically reducing the number of trades required on site.
overviewPara3: This streamlined, pre-finished system shortens timelines, cuts complexity, and redefines how Australia builds.

spanTable.h2: Recommended single spans — patios less than 3m high.
spanTable.lead: Maximum spans (mm) by wind classification, panel thickness and number of open sides. Confirm specification with our team for site-specific conditions.
spanTable.footnote: Values in mm. Service / structural roof pressures shown in kPa.

technicalSpecs.lead: Material build-up, weights and insulation factors for Insulspan® across all panel thicknesses.

construction.title: Construction
items: Colorbond Monospan or Corrugated external cladding
Expanded Polystyrene (EPS-FR) core including flame retardant additive
